# CrewSwarm

> Multi-agent AI orchestration layer for OpenCode, Cursor CLI, and Claude Code. A crew of specialist AI agents (coder, QA, PM, fixer, security, copywriter, and more) collaborate on tasks via a real-time WebSocket bus. Led by Stinki — the AI captain who plans, dispatches, and ships.

## What is CrewSwarm?

CrewSwarm is an open-source multi-agent orchestration system. It runs a crew of specialist AI agents that collaborate on software development tasks. Each agent can be routed through OpenCode CLI, Cursor CLI, Claude Code, or a direct LLM API call — configurable per agent from a web dashboard.

Key features:
- Real-time WebSocket message bus connecting all agents
- PM-loop: autonomous project mode that reads a ROADMAP.md and dispatches tasks one by one
- Per-agent execution routing: Direct API, OpenCode, Cursor CLI, or Claude Code
- Bring your own LLM: supports Groq, DeepSeek, xAI (Grok), Anthropic, OpenAI, Mistral, Cerebras, NVIDIA, Google, Perplexity
- Web dashboard on port 4319 for agent management, model assignment, skills, spending caps
- Telegram and WhatsApp integration for mobile access
- Background consciousness: crew-main periodically reflects on system health when idle
- Memory system: shared brain.md, lessons.md, decisions.md, global-rules.md injected into every agent
- Skill plugins: data-driven JSON plugins that extend agent capabilities without code changes

## Agent Roster

- **crew-lead (Stinki)**: Conversational commander, chat interface, dispatches tasks
- **crew-coder**: Full-stack coding agent
- **crew-coder-front**: Frontend / UI specialist
- **crew-coder-back**: Backend / API specialist
- **crew-frontend**: CSS and design polish
- **crew-fixer**: Bug fixing and auto-escalation
- **crew-qa**: Quality assurance and audit
- **crew-pm**: Project planning and roadmap management
- **crew-security**: Security review and vulnerability scanning
- **crew-copywriter**: Writing, docs, and content
- **crew-github**: Git operations and pull requests
- **crew-main**: General coordinator and synthesis

## Execution Modes

| Mode | How it works |
|---|---|
| Direct API | Agent calls LLM provider directly, parses @@TOOL markers |
| OpenCode | Tasks run inside `opencode run` — full file editing, bash, session memory |
| Cursor CLI | Tasks run via `cursor --model <model> --execute` |
| Claude Code | Tasks run via `claude -p` |

## Service Ports

- Dashboard (Vite frontend + API): 4319
- crew-lead (chat + dispatch): 5010
- RT message bus: 18889
- Code Engine (OpenCode / Claude Code): 4096
- MCP + OpenAI-compatible API (optional): 5020

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
bash install.sh
npm run restart-all
# Open http://127.0.0.1:4319
```

Requires Node.js 20+. A free Groq API key is enough to run the full crew.
